CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-30-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Mattters In Equest Fo Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted; Memorandum In Support Of Motion; Declaration In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request Fo Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

JP Morgan Chase N.A.'s unopposed motion to deem requests for admissions admitted is granted. The truth of any matters specified in the requests is deemed admitted in light of responding party's failure to respond to the requests for admissions before the date of hearing. See CCP 2033.280(b).

CCP 2033.280(c) states that a court order for sanctions is mandatory in this circumstance. The court orders defendant Bethany Sherbo to pay $100 to JP Morgan Chase, by payment to its counsel, within 20 court days of the date of notice of entry of this order.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
